subcodes.first_line: O steadfast one in the Covenant! The letter of that luminous youth and that divine friendship hath arrived, most concise yet full of meaning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه آنجوان نورانی و الفتی الرحمانی رسید و بسیار مختصر و مفید
subcodes.subjects: @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @principle of balance; moderation; equilibrium, @praise and encouragement
